tasks.prompt: continuous evolution loop following ASSESS → PLAN → EXECUTE → VERIFY → EVOLVE → LOOP cycle. ASSESS: read @AGENTS.md, @PROGRESS.md, @GOAL.md, @IDEIA.md, memory files. PLAN: identify 1-3 priority tasks from PROGRESS.md gaps. EXECUTE: implement tasks, write tests. VERIFY: run npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test:run. EVOLVE: if all pass, commit with Co-Authored-By trailer and update memory with learnings. LOOP: continue to next cycle.
